name: LQCDMaster: Agentic Scientific Computing for Lattice Quantum Chromodynamics Research

description: arXiv:2607.15001v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Lattice quantum chromodynamics (LQCD) provides a first-principles framework for computing hadronic observables, but its practical use remains limited by the substantial expertise required to turn research motivation into reliable computing workflows. Here we present \textsc{LQCDMaster}, a tool-augmented, skill-guided and domain-specialized scien...
author: Haofei Gao, Tingjia Miao, Wenkai Jin, Muhua Zhang, Hanzhang Wang, Jie Ran, Jinxin Tan, Zhentao Zhang, Bo Tang, Leiyi Li, Jun Hua, Xiangyu Jiang, Qi-An Zhang, Siheng Chen, Wei Wang
